steps.title: Identify the count for each part type
steps.content:
From the problem statement:
  • 9-inch parts: $n$ (the reference quantity)
  • 8-inch parts: $4n$ (4 times the 9-inch count)
  • 3-inch parts: \$30$ (fixed)

steps.title: Build and simplify the total equation
steps.content:
The machine makes 100 parts total, so:
$$4n + n + 30 = 100$$
Combine like terms: $4n + n = 5n$:
$$5n + 30 = 100$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
